attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.BATCH_ID, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.BATCH_NAME, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.BATCH_DATE, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.CONTROL_INVOICE_COUNT, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.CONTROL_INVOICE_TOTAL, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ACTUAL_INVOICE_COUNT, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ACTUAL_INVOICE_TOTAL, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.PAYMENT_CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.PAY_GROUP_LOOKUP_CODE, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.BATCH_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.TERMS_ID, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.INVOICE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.HOLD_LOOKUP_CODE, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.HOLD_REASON, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.DOC_CATEGORY_CODE, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.ORG_ID, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.GL_DATE, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.PAYMENT_PRIORITY, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL,
 (
 select BATCH_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL
 minus
 select BATCH_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.BATCH_ID = STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.BATCH_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL)
